text: Upon waking to see the morning sun after a restless night, I experienced a surge of happiness intertwined with astonishment.
Waking up to the morning sunlight following a sleepless night, I felt a mixture of joy and surprise.
After a restless night, arising to the morning sunlit moment, I experienced a blend of joy and astonishment.
Waking up from a sleepless night as the sun illuminated the dawn, I felt a mixture of delight and surprise.
After a night without sleep, I experienced joy and astonishment as the sunlit dawn greeted me upon waking.
Upon waking to the sunlight of dawn after a sleepless night, I felt joyful and amazed.
After staying up late and waking to the sunrise, I felt joyous and astonished.
After pulling an all-nighter and awakening to the dawn, I felt joyful and amazed.
Awakening after a sleepless night as the morning light broke, I felt joyous and amazed.
Waking up after a restless night as dawn lit the sky, I felt joyful and astonished.
Awakening from a disturbed night as the morning light illuminated the sky, I experienced joy and surprise.
Waking up in the morning after a restless night with the light brightening the sky, I felt joyful and surprised.
After a sleepless night and waking to the brightening dawn, I experienced joy and surprise.
Following a restless night and rising as the day began to brighten, I felt joyful and surprised.
After lying awake through the night and getting up as dawn lit the sky, I felt joyous and unexpected happiness.
Having stayed up all night until the morning light, I experienced an unforeseen sense of joy when I rose with the dawn.
After pulling an all-nighter into the晨光，我在黎明时分醒来，意外地感到了一种喜悦。
After staying up all night until the early morning light, I woke up at dawn and unexpectedly felt joy.
Having stayed up through the night into the early hours of the morning, I awoke at dawn feeling surprisingly joyful.
After pulling an all-nighter and waking up before noon, I found myself unexpectedly cheerful.
Despite staying awake all night, I was surprisingly happy when I woke up before noon.
Despite not sleeping all night, I unexpectedly found myself cheerful upon waking before midday.
Despite staying up all night, I surprisingly woke up feeling cheery before noon.
Although I stayed awake all night, to my surprise, I felt happy and woke up before noon.
Even though I was awake all through the night, to my surprise, I felt cheerful and managed to wake up before noon.
Although I stayed up all night, surprisingly, I felt cheerful and woke up before noon.
Even though I was awake the entire night, to my surprise, I felt happy and woke up early in the morning before noon.
Although I stayed up all night, surprisingly, I felt cheerful and rose before noon.
Despite pulling an all-nighter, to my surprise, I felt energetic and got up early in the morning.
Despite staying up all night, I was surprisingly full of energy and woke up early in the morning.
Despite pulling an all-nighter, I surprisingly had a lot of energy and woke up early in the morning.
Although I stayed up all night, I was unexpectedly full of energy and managed to wake up early in the morning.
Despite not getting any sleep last night, I surprisingly woke up early and felt energetic.
Despite staying awake all night, I ended up waking up early and feeling full of energy.
Although I stayed up late into the night, I surprisingly found myself waking up early with lots of energy.
Despite staying up晚了，我却意外地早起且充满活力。 (虽然熬夜到深夜，我还是意外地早早起床并且精力充沛。)
Although I stayed up late last night, I surprisingly woke up early and felt full of energy.

Despite staying up晚了，我竟然起得特别早，并且精神饱满。 (Note: The translation uses "晚了" for "late," which is not appropriate in the final sentence due to language differences. A corrected version would be: Despite staying up late last night, I surprisingly woke up early and felt full of energy.)
Despite going to bed late, I unexpectedly rose early and felt energetic.
Even though I went to bed late, I surprisingly woke up early feeling full of energy.
